data.name: AdminUsersCannotBeLinked
data.value: Administrator users cannot be linked through this feature.

data.name: ChildCollectionMustPointToSelectedParent
data.value: Every child collection must point to a parent collection selected in the profile.

data.name: CollectionAlreadyExists
data.value: A collection with the same name and type already exists in the informed scope.

data.name: CollectionCannotBeChildOfItself
data.value: A collection cannot be its own child.

data.name: CollectionDeleteActiveLinks
data.value: The collection could not be deleted because it has active links.

data.name: CollectionDeleteLinkedDocuments
data.value: The collection cannot be deleted because it is linked to documents.

data.name: CollectionInvalid
data.value: Invalid collection.

data.name: CollectionNameMaxLength
data.value: Collection name must be at most 150 characters.

data.name: CollectionNameRequired
data.value: Collection name is required.

data.name: CollectionNotFound
data.value: Collection not found.

data.name: CollectionRequired
data.value: Collection is required.

data.name: ColumnIndexPositive
data.value: Column index must be a positive number.

data.name: ColumnIndexRequired
data.value: Column index is required.

data.name: CloneNameMaxLength
data.value: Clone name must be at most 150 characters.

data.name: CloneNameRequired
data.value: Clone name is required.

data.name: CompanyAlreadyExistsWithName
data.value: A company with this name already exists.

data.name: CompanyNameRequired
data.value: Company name is required.

data.name: CompanyNotFound
data.value: Company not found.

data.name: ConfigurationNotFound
data.value: Company configuration not found.

data.name: CredentialsInvalid
data.value: Invalid credentials.

data.name: DateInvalid
data.value: Invalid date: {0}

data.name: DateTimeFieldFormatRequired
data.value: Format is required when the field type is DateTime.

data.name: DefaultMappingsCannotBeDeleted
data.value: Default mappings cannot be deleted.

data.name: DocumentAlreadyExistsWithNameOrEndpoint
data.value: A document with the same name or endpoint already exists.

data.name: DocumentAlreadyImportedWithSuccess
data.value: Document skipped because a previous successful import already exists for the same identifier.

data.name: DocumentDeleteLinkedRecords
data.value: The document could not be deleted because it is linked to other records.

data.name: DocumentEndpointRequired
data.value: Document endpoint is required.

data.name: DocumentHasNoLinkedCollections
data.value: The informed document has no linked collections.

data.name: DocumentMustHaveHeaderCollection
data.value: The document must have at least one linked header collection.

data.name: DocumentNameRequired
data.value: Document name is required.

data.name: DocumentNotFound
data.value: Document not found.

data.name: DocumentProcessedSuccessfully
data.value: Document processed successfully.

data.name: DocumentInvalid
data.value: Invalid document.

data.name: DocumentRequired
data.value: Document is required.

data.name: DuplicateCollectionsProfile
data.value: Collections cannot be duplicated within the same profile.

data.name: EmailAlreadyRegistered
data.value: E-mail is already registered.

data.name: EmptyIdExcelValueAtRow
data.value: Empty value in column '#' at row {0}.

data.name: FileRequired
data.value: File is required.

data.name: FieldNameMaxLength
data.value: Field name must be at most 150 characters.

data.name: FieldNameRequired
data.value: Field name is required.

data.name: FieldTypeRequired
data.value: Field type is required.

data.name: FormatMaxLength
data.value: Format must be at most 50 characters.

data.name: HeaderCollectionsCannotBeNested
data.value: Header collections cannot be nested.

data.name: InvalidBooleanValue
data.value: Invalid boolean value: {0}

data.name: InvalidExcelFile
data.value: The Excel file is empty, corrupted, or in an invalid format.

data.name: InvalidDocumentLinks
data.value: The documents informed for linking are invalid.

data.name: InvalidIdExcelValueAtRow
data.value: Invalid value in column '#' at row {0}: '{1}'. Enter an integer.

data.name: InvalidIntegerValue
data.value: Invalid integer value: {0}

data.name: InvalidLanguage
data.value: Invalid language.

data.name: InvalidNumericValue
data.value: Invalid numeric value: {0}

data.name: MappingCollectionCannotBeChanged
data.value: The mapping collection cannot be changed.

data.name: MappingDoesNotBelongToCollection
data.value: Mapping {0} does not belong to collection {1}.

data.name: MappingFieldColumnIndexAlreadyExists
data.value: A field with column index {0} already exists in this mapping.

data.name: MappingFieldMappingCannotBeChanged
data.value: The field mapping cannot be changed.

data.name: MappingFieldNotFound
data.value: Mapping field not found.

data.name: MappingInvalid
data.value: Invalid mapping.

data.name: MappingIdNotFound
data.value: Mapping {0} not found.

data.name: MappingNameMaxLength
data.value: Mapping name must be at most 150 characters.

data.name: MappingNameRequired
data.value: Mapping name is required.

data.name: MappingProfileDoesNotBelongToDocument
data.value: The informed mapping profile does not belong to the selected document.

data.name: MappingProfileDocumentCannotBeChanged
data.value: The profile document cannot be changed.

data.name: MappingProfileHasNoItems
data.value: The informed mapping profile has no items for processing.

data.name: MappingProfileNotFound
data.value: Mapping profile not found.

data.name: MappingNotFound
data.value: Mapping not found.

data.name: MappingRequired
data.value: Mapping is required.

data.name: OnlyAdminsCanChangeDefaultMappings
data.value: Only administrators can change default mappings.

data.name: OnlyAdminsCanChangeDocuments
data.value: Only administrators can change documents.

data.name: OnlyAdminsCanChangeSystemCollections
data.value: Only administrators can change system default collections.

data.name: OnlyAdminsCanCreateDefaultMappings
data.value: Only administrators can create default mappings.

data.name: OnlyAdminsCanCreateDefaultProfiles
data.value: Only administrators can create default profiles.

data.name: OnlyAdminsCanExecuteAction
data.value: Only administrators can execute this action.

data.name: OnlyAdminsCanRegisterCompanies
data.value: Only administrators can register companies.

data.name: OnlyExcelFilesAccepted
data.value: Only Excel .xlsx files are accepted.

data.name: OnlyLineCollectionsCanBeNested
data.value: Only line collections can be nested.

data.name: OneOrMoreDocumentsNotFound
data.value: One or more informed documents were not found.

data.name: PasswordResetCodeInvalidOrExpired
data.value: Invalid or expired code.

data.name: ProcessingNotFound
data.value: Processing not found.

data.name: ProcessingWithoutMappingProfileNotSupported
data.value: Processing without a mapping profile is not supported.

data.name: ProfileNameMaxLength
data.value: Profile name must be at most 150 characters.

data.name: ProfileNameRequired
data.value: Profile name is required.

data.name: ProfileCollectionRelationshipCycle
data.value: The relationship between profile collections contains a cycle.

data.name: ProfileContainsCollectionsNotInDocument
data.value: The profile contains collections that do not belong to the selected document.

data.name: ProfileMustContainExactlyOneHeaderCollection
data.value: The profile must contain exactly one header collection.

data.name: RequiredIdExcelColumnNotFound
data.value: The required column '#' was not found in the spreadsheet header rows.

data.name: SapAuthenticationCookieNotReturned
data.value: SAP Service Layer did not return an authentication cookie.

data.name: SapSendPermissionUnavailable
data.value: Could not obtain permission to send to SAP.

data.name: SelectAtLeastOneCollectionForProfile
data.value: Select at least one collection to compose the profile.

data.name: SelectAtLeastOneLineCollection
data.value: Select at least one line collection to compose the profile.

data.name: SelectAtLeastOneRootLineCollection
data.value: Select at least one root line collection to compose the profile.

data.name: SpreadsheetEmptyRows
data.value: The spreadsheet has no filled rows.

data.name: SpreadsheetNoDataRows
data.value: The spreadsheet has no data rows for processing.

data.name: TokenInvalidForCurrentUser
data.value: Invalid token for the current user.

data.name: UserCannotCreateMappingsForAnotherCompany
data.value: User cannot create mappings for another company.

data.name: UserCannotCreateProfilesForAnotherCompany
data.value: User cannot create profiles for another company.

data.name: UserCompanyNotFound
data.value: User company not found.

data.name: UserDoesNotHaveAccessToCollection
data.value: User does not have access to this collection.

data.name: UserDoesNotHaveAccessToCompany
data.value: User does not have access to the informed company.

data.name: UserDoesNotHaveAccessToMapping
data.value: User does not have access to this mapping.

data.name: UserDoesNotHaveAccessToMappingProfile
data.value: User does not have access to this mapping profile.

data.name: UserDoesNotHavePermissionToChangeMapping
data.value: User does not have permission to change this mapping.

data.name: UserDoesNotHavePermissionToChangeProfile
data.value: User does not have permission to change this profile.

data.name: UserIdentifierInvalidInToken
data.value: Invalid user identifier in the token.

data.name: UserInactive
data.value: User is inactive.

data.name: UserNotAuthenticated
data.value: User is not authenticated.

data.name: UserNotFound
data.value: User not found.

data.name: UsernameAlreadyRegistered
data.value: Username is already registered.

data.name: UserWithoutCompanyCannotCloneMappings
data.value: User without a linked company cannot clone mappings.

data.name: UserWithoutCompanyCannotCloneProfiles
data.value: User without a linked company cannot clone profiles.

data.name: UserWithoutCompanyCannotCreateMappings
data.value: User without a linked company cannot create mappings.

data.name: UserWithoutCompanyCannotCreateProfiles
data.value: User without a linked company cannot create profiles.

data.name: UserWithoutCompanyCannotExecuteAction
data.value: User without a linked company cannot execute this action.
